skill_text:
Hokkien unit HiFiGAN based vocoder from fairseq. Trained with TAT-TTS data with 4 speakers in Taiwanese Hokkien accent. Framework: Fairseq. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: load_model_ensemble_and_task_from_hf_hub('facebook/unit_hifigan_HK_layer12.km2500_frame_TAT-TT'). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `fairseq__unit_hifigan_hk_layer12_km2500_frame_tat_tts__load_model_ense_d3728fc8` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
- Use examples to map paraphrases into schema-faithful arguments.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
